insight: Timed spawn rules (LOCATION_PERIOD, PERIOD) measure Delay from the last spawn and only consult the last death when the boss died at or after its next scheduled run, so a kill just before the window expires respawns near-instantly by design; only RESPAWN_AFTER_DEATH guarantees death+Delay. Do not make timed rules always wait death+Delay, that reopens the #1537 fixed-schedule regression (history: #1505, #1506, #1537, #1541).

On boss death the respawn cooldown is stamped as Last_Death in the spawn rule's YAML, found via the Boss_Spawn_Rule metadata tag on the dying entity. If Last_Death is missing from the rule file right after a kill, the death was not recorded (entity spawned by egg/command/another rule, or rule renamed), and killing rule A's boss never cooldowns an overlapping rule B for the same location.
